_comment: Surface keyword: `shaping`. Distinct from `progressive` (ProgressiveTraining, across-session parameter progression). Desugars per `method` field: artful→CRF+@procedure Phase, percentile→Pctl Phase, staged→ProgressiveTraining.

description: Skinner Shaping with method=artful (default) and only a target declaration. Desugars to a Phase with CRF schedule, @procedure annotation, and ExperimenterJudgment criterion.
expected_note: Desugars to Phase { schedule: CRF, annotations: [@procedure(shape, target=KeyPeck, method=artful)], criterion: ExperimenterJudgment }.

description: Skinner Shaping with method=artful and explicit approximations list. Standard pigeon key-peck procedure (Ferster & Skinner, 1957; Peterson, 2004).
input:
shaping KeyPeckShaping:
  target = "KeyPeck"
  method = artful
  approximations = ["orient", "approach", "contact", "peck"]
expected_note: Approximations appear as annotation metadata for documentation; execution remains experimenter-judged. No parse error; no runtime execution rule for approximations individually.

description: Skinner Shaping with method=artful and an explicit stability criterion. The phase-change criterion overrides the default ExperimenterJudgment.
expected_note: stability_spec and session_spec compose as usual. Desugars to Phase with CRF + @procedure + Stability(min_sessions=2, method=visual) criterion.

description: Automated percentile shaping of force (Platt, 1973; Galbicka, 1994). method=percentile with dimension=force and percentile_rank=50.
input:
shaping LeverForceShaping:
  target = "LeverPress"
  method = percentile
  dimension = force
  percentile_rank = 50
  percentile_window = 20
  stable(visual)
expected_note: Desugars to Phase { schedule: Pctl(force, 50, window=20, dir=below), annotations: [@procedure(shape, target=LeverPress, method=percentile, dimension=force)], criterion: stability_spec }.

description: Staged shaping with pre-enumerated stages. Desugars to ProgressiveTraining (equivalent semantics to progressive_decl with explicit stages).
input:
shaping LeverPressShaping:
  target = "LeverPress"
  method = staged
  stages = [CRF, DRH2s, DRH1s]
  sessions >= 3
  stable(visual)
expected_note: Desugars to a ProgressiveTraining with synthetic integer index; each stage becomes an independent phase with the shared criterion.

description: Skinner Shaping declaration composed with regular phase declarations. The Shaping phase appears in the PhaseSequence at its declaration position.
input:
phase MagazineTraining:
  sessions = 1
  VT60s

shaping KeyPeckShaping:
  target = "KeyPeck"
  approximations = ["orient", "peck"]

phase Acquisition:
  sessions >= 20
  stable(visual)
  VI60s
expected_note: Three phases total: MagazineTraining → KeyPeckShaping (artful, ExperimenterJudgment) → Acquisition.

description: §83: target is required. Omission raises MISSING_SHAPING_TARGET.
§84: method must be artful | percentile | staged. Unknown value raises UNKNOWN_SHAPING_METHOD.
§85: method=percentile requires dimension. Missing dimension raises INCOMPLETE_PERCENTILE_SHAPING.
input:
shaping LeverForceShaping:
  target = "LeverPress"
  method = percentile
  percentile_rank = 50
  stable(visual)

description: §85: method=percentile requires percentile_rank. Missing rank raises INCOMPLETE_PERCENTILE_SHAPING.
input:
shaping LeverForceShaping:
  target = "LeverPress"
  method = percentile
  dimension = force
  stable(visual)

description: §86: method=staged requires stages list. Missing stages raises INCOMPLETE_STAGED_SHAPING.
input:
shaping LeverPressShaping:
  target = "LeverPress"
  method = staged
  sessions >= 3

description: §93: stages must contain at least 2 elements. Single stage raises SHAPING_INSUFFICIENT_STAGES.
input:
shaping LeverPressShaping:
  target = "LeverPress"
  method = staged
  stages = [CRF]
  sessions >= 3

description: §88: percentile_rank must be in [0, 100]. Out of range raises PCTL_INVALID_RANK (reused from core-stateful §P1).
input:
shaping LeverForceShaping:
  target = "LeverPress"
  method = percentile
  dimension = force
  percentile_rank = 150
  stable(visual)

description: §91: method=artful forbids dimension / percentile_* / stages. Declaring them raises SHAPING_META_METHOD_MISMATCH.
input:
shaping KeyPeckShaping:
  target = "KeyPeck"
  method = artful
  dimension = force

description: §90: each shaping_meta may appear at most once. Duplicate target raises DUPLICATE_SHAPING_META.
